name: Cool'n Easy Easter Pie
recipeIngredient: Strawberry flavor gelatin or any flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir boiling water into the gelatin until completely dissolved.
2. Mix cold water and ice to make 1 1/4 cups.
3. Add this mixture to the gelatin and stir until slightly thickened.
4. Remove any remaining ice.
5. Stir in the whipped topping with a wire whisk until smooth.
6. Refrigerate for 10 minutes, or until the mixture will mound.
7. Spoon into the crust.
8. Refrigerate for 4 hours, or until firm.
9. Garnish with additional whipped topping and jelly beans, if desired.
10. Store leftover pie in the refrigerator.
